title: [ST]Drive
description: Adds cool customizable cars to drive with friends!
body:
NOTE: 

  • Mod requires  HammerLib to work!
  • Mod requires  HammerAnimations to work!

[ST]Drive is an easy-to-install drag-and-drop mod that adds a fully drivable, multiplayer-ready car with deep yet intuitive systems. Pile in with friends, cruise the world, and keep your ride alive with proper refueling and roadside toolkits. Respray your car, add some underlights and you're good to go! Mod is a great fit to almost any modpack, from near-vanilla survival to endgame packs where speed, damage, and health numbers go wild!

With this mod you get:

  • A cool-looking, fast-driving, joy-bringing car
  • New villager profession
  • New world-gen
  • Some car-related crafts and dungeon loot
    And more!..

You can find the car inside a special structure that generates in a village — a custom-built house with a garage. The car is parked inside the garage, and next to it is a separate room where a mechanic villager lives. His workstation is also located there. To gain access to the car, you need to purchase an ignition key from the mechanic — this trade becomes available once he reaches the "master" level. After purchase, the car is bound to the player. From that moment, you can refuel and start the car. (Optionally, you can also repaint it using a spray can.)



To start the car, you need to refuel it using a fuel canister. Currently, fuel canisters can only be purchased from the mechanic villager at the "journeyman" trade level. If the car crashes into an obstacle that it cannot climb (2 blocks high or more) at high speed, it breaks. While broken, the car’s maximum speed is significantly reduced. To repair it, you need a repair kit, which can be purchased from the mechanic villager at the "expert" trade level.

The car also can be customized by underlights and sprayed to a vast variety of colors (they also can be mixed up directly on a car). Some of the recipes for underlights are shown on a picture above.

Enjoy! Gather friends, fuel up and go for a ride! Don't forget your pets tho.
Small tip: car also can be dragged around by leash, if heavily broken.


Enjoy!
